params.name: name
params.description: Required. Material sprite icon name in PascalCase, for example `Search` or `UnfoldMore`.

params.name: size
params.description: Fixed icon size. Use `16`, `24`, or `32` when the icon should stay the same size across every breakpoint. Do not use this together with `responsiveSize`.

params.name: responsiveSize
params.description: Responsive icon size. Use `16`, `24`, or `32` to follow the toolkit iconography scale instead of a fixed size. Do not use this together with `size`.

params.name: title
params.description: Accessible label for meaningful standalone icons. Leave this empty for decorative icons.

params.name: color
params.description: Optional CSS colour value applied through `currentColor` for monochrome icons.

params.name: classes
params.description: Additional classes for the rendered `<svg>` element.

params.name: attributes
params.description: Additional HTML attributes for the `<svg>` element, for example `data-*` attributes.

params.name: spritePath
params.description: Advanced override for the sprite URL. Defaults to `/assets/icons/icon-sprite.svg`.
